name: CollabEditor
description: Real-time level collaboration tool for Geometry Dash.

auto-connect.name: Auto-Connect on Level Load
auto-connect.description: Automatically connect to P2P network when loading a collaborative level

sync-cursor.name: Show Remote Cursors
sync-cursor.description: Display real-time cursor positions of collaborators

sync-objects.name: Real-time Object Sync
sync-objects.description: Synchronize object movements and locks in real-time

show-names.name: Show Collaborator Names
show-names.description: Display name labels above remote cursors

max-remote-players.name: Maximum Remote Players
max-remote-players.description: Limit number of visible remote cursors (improves performance)

sync-interval.name: Sync Interval (ms)
sync-interval.description: Milliseconds between position sync updates (lower = more responsive, higher = less network traffic)
